title: Slavonski Brod、Slavonski Brod-Posavina — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Slavonski Brod、Slavonski Brod-Posavinaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Slavonski BrodはSlavonski Brod-Posavinaにある人口53,473の都市です。A city in eastern Croatia on the Sava River, known for the Brod Fortress, a vibrant cultural scene, and its strategic location on the border with Bosnia.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
